name: Groupama Assurances Mutuelles
summary: Groupama Assurances Mutuelles, a mutual insurance company, provides a range of insurance, banking, and financial services. It offers life and health insurance products, including individual health, individual protection and other, life, and group insurance products, as well as retirement and pension products; and property and casualty insurance products comprising motor, home, assistance, remote surveillance, remote alarm, legal protection, credit, agricultural, and construction insurance products, as well as insurance products for specialized services and companies, businesses, professionals, associations, and local authorities. The company also provides various banking products and services; asset management and property management services; and employee saving products, as well as reinsurance products. In addition, it offers online insurance solutions. The company provides its products through local mutuals, general agents, partner brokers, and representatives in France. It operates in Bulgaria, China, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Romania, Slovakia, Tunisia, and Turkey. The company was formerly known as Groupama S.A. and changed its name to Groupama Assurances Mutuelles in June 2018. The company is based in Paris, France. Groupama Assurances Mutuelles operates as a subsidiary of Groupama Holding S.A.
